name: South West State (Somalia)

colors.symbolism: the upper hoist division, the Somali blue

description: A diagonally divided flag - light blue at the upper hoist, a red diagonal band, and green at the lower fly - with a large white five-pointed star on the blue and five smaller white stars in a ring on the green.
history: The South West State of Somalia (Koonfur Galbeed) is a federal member state in south-western Somalia, first proclaimed in 2002 and re-established in November 2014; its administrative centre is Baidoa.

features.role: large star on the blue division
five stars in a ring on the green division
